Why A+ Tuition?

Everything You Need to Succeed

A complete learning ecosystem — not just another video platform. CAPS & IEB aligned, open 24/7.

🤖
AI Homework Assistant

Get step-by-step help on any question, any time. Our AI tutor understands SA curriculum structure.

📊
Progress Tracking

Real-time dashboards, XP points, badges, and streak tracking to keep you motivated and on track.

✅
Timed Assessments

Exam-style tests with instant marking, detailed feedback, and performance analytics.

📐
Formula Sheets

Grade-specific formula reference cards for Maths, Science, Finance, Stats, and Trigonometry.

🏆
Leaderboards

Compete with classmates, earn badges, and celebrate your wins on the class leaderboard.

👩‍🏫
Virtual Teacher

Choose your teacher avatar. Voice-enabled lessons with speech synthesis for immersive learning.

📅
Study Planner

Build your weekly study schedule, set targets, and get auto-generated study plans by topic.

📂
Resource Bank

Curated notes, past papers, and reference materials — organized by grade and subject.

🦉
